chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.31 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on M.A. No.544/23 2.For hg of main case 3.For orders on M.A. No.4089/23 14.11.2024. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Rind, advocate for applicant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Buriro, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. I have heard learned counsel for the applicant, who has challenged an order dated 29.12.2022 passed by learned VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi-South dismissing his application under section 22-A & B Cr. P.C. for registration of FIR. It appears from the impugned order that there is a civil litigation pending between the parties which applicant is trying to convert into criminal litigation. This application has also been opposed by learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Therefore, I find no merits in this application which is accordingly dismissed, however, the applicant is at liberty to avail the remedy in accordance with law. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE HANIF
